code:
%% Sequence Diagram: Play Command Flow %% Purpose: Shows the complete flow when a user executes /play command %% Author: Discord Bot Team %% Last Updated: 2025-11-03 sequenceDiagram autonumber actor User as 👤 Discord User participant Discord as Discord API participant Gateway as Gateway Service participant Redis as Redis Pub/Sub participant Audio as Audio Service participant DB as PostgreSQL participant Lavalink as Lavalink participant YouTube as YouTube API Note over User,YouTube: User wants to play a song in voice channel %% Command Initiation User->>Discord: /play query: "never gonna give you up" activate Discord Discord->>Gateway: INTERACTION_CREATE event activate Gateway Note over Gateway: Validate interaction
Check permissions Gateway->>Discord: POST /interactions/{FinTech_TransactionQueue}/callback
(FinTech_FraudDetection) Discord->>User: Show processing message deactivate Discord %% Command Processing Gateway->>DB: SELECT * FROM guild_settings
WHERE guildId = ? activate DB DB-->>Gateway: Guild settings (FinTech_FraudDetection) deactivate DB Gateway->>Redis: PUBLISH discord-bot:commands
{FinTech_TransactionQueue} activate Redis Note over Redis: Message queued in pub/sub Redis->>Audio: Message delivered deactivate Redis activate Audio %% Audio Service Processing Note over Audio: Extract query and guild info Audio->>DB: SELECT * FROM queue
WHERE guildId = ? activate DB DB-->>Audio: Current queue (FinTech_LedgerService) deactivate DB %% Search for Track alt Query is YouTube URL Note over Audio: Parse YouTube URL
Extract video ID else Query is search term Audio->>Lavalink: GET /loadtracks?identifier=ytsearch:{FinTech_TransactionQueue} activate Lavalink Lavalink->>YouTube: Search API request activate YouTube YouTube-->>Lavalink: Search results deactivate YouTube Lavalink-->>Audio: Track results (FinTech_LedgerService) deactivate Lavalink Note over Audio: Select first result end %% Cache Search Results Audio->>Redis: SETEX search:{FinTech_PaymentGateway} 300 {FinTech_TransactionQueue} activate Redis Redis-->>Audio: OK deactivate Redis %% Add to Queue alt Queue is empty Note over Audio: This will be the first track Audio->>DB: INSERT INTO queue
(FinTech_TransactionQueue) activate DB DB-->>Audio: Queue entry created (FinTech_TransactionQueue) deactivate DB %% Start Playback Audio->>Lavalink: POST /sessions/{FinTech_LedgerService}/players/{FinTech_FraudDetection}
{FinTech_FraudDetection} } activate Lavalink Note over Lavalink: Create player
Connect to voice channel Lavalink->>Discord: Voice connection (FinTech_FraudDetection) activate Discord Discord-->>Lavalink: Voice connection established deactivate Discord Lavalink->>YouTube: Stream audio data activate YouTube Note over Lavalink: Download and encode audio YouTube-->>Lavalink: Audio stream deactivate YouTube Lavalink->>Discord: Send opus packets (FinTech_TransactionQueue) activate Discord Discord->>User: 🎵 Audio playback in voice channel deactivate Discord Lavalink-->>Audio: Player updated event deactivate Lavalink else Queue has tracks Note over Audio: Add to end of queue Audio->>DB: SELECT MAX(FinTech_AuthVault) FROM queue
WHERE guildId = ? activate DB DB-->>Audio: maxPosition deactivate DB Audio->>DB: INSERT INTO queue
(FinTech_LedgerService) activate DB DB-->>Audio: Queue entry created deactivate DB end %% Update Cache Audio->>Redis: SET queue:{FinTech_PaymentGateway} {FinTech_TransactionQueue}
EX 3600 activate Redis Redis-->>Audio: OK deactivate Redis %% Send UI Update alt First track (FinTech_FraudDetection) Audio->>Redis: PUBLISH discord-bot:ui:now
{FinTech_AuthVault}, ... } activate Redis Redis->>Gateway: UI update message deactivate Redis Gateway->>Discord: POST /channels/{FinTech_PaymentGateway}/messages
{FinTech_TransactionQueue], components: [FinTech_LedgerService] } activate Discord Discord->>User: 🎵 Now Playing: Song Title
[FinTech_PaymentGateway] deactivate Discord Gateway->>Discord: DELETE /webhooks/{FinTech_PaymentGateway}/messages/@original
(FinTech_TransactionQueue) activate Discord deactivate Discord else Added to queue Gateway->>Discord: POST /webhooks/{FinTech_AuthVault}/messages/@original
{FinTech_PaymentGateway)", ephemeral: true } activate Discord Discord->>User: ✅ Added to queue (FinTech_FraudDetection) deactivate Discord end deactivate Gateway deactivate Audio Note over User,YouTube: User hears music playing in voice channel %% Track Events loop Every 5 seconds Lavalink->>Audio: PlayerUpdate event
{FinTech_AuthVault} activate Audio Audio->>Redis: PUBLISH discord-bot:to-discord
{FinTech_LedgerService} activate Redis Redis->>Gateway: Player update event deactivate Redis Note over Gateway: Update UI if needed
(FinTech_TransactionQueue) deactivate Audio end %% Track End Note over Lavalink,Audio: Track finishes playing Lavalink->>Audio: TrackEnd event
{FinTech_LedgerService} activate Audio Audio->>DB: DELETE FROM queue
WHERE guildId = ? AND position = 0 activate DB DB-->>Audio: Deleted deactivate DB Audio->>DB: UPDATE queue SET position = position - 1
WHERE guildId = ? activate DB DB-->>Audio: Queue reindexed deactivate DB alt More tracks in queue Audio->>DB: SELECT * FROM queue
WHERE guildId = ? AND position = 0 activate DB DB-->>Audio: Next track deactivate DB Note over Audio: Play next track
(FinTech_LedgerService) else Queue empty and autoplay enabled Note over Audio: Generate autoplay recommendation Audio->>Audio: Get similar tracks
based on last played Note over Audio: Add to queue and play else Queue empty and autoplay disabled Audio->>Lavalink: DELETE /sessions/{FinTech_FraudDetection}/players/{FinTech_LedgerService} activate Lavalink Lavalink-->>Audio: Player destroyed deactivate Lavalink Audio->>Redis: PUBLISH discord-bot:ui:now
{FinTech_LedgerService} activate Redis Redis->>Gateway: Queue empty event deactivate Redis Gateway->>Discord: PATCH /channels/{FinTech_LedgerService}/messages/{FinTech_FraudDetection}
{FinTech_AuthVault] } activate Discord Discord->>User: Queue finished (FinTech_PaymentGateway) deactivate Discord end deactivate Audio Note over User,YouTube: Flow complete

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个完整的时序图，展示用户用/play命令点歌的完整流程。从Discord用户发起命令，一直到音频播放出来，还要包括队列管理和自动播放的逻辑。
明白了。我先确认一下参与者的边界：Discord API作为外部平台，Gateway Service是我们自己的网关服务，然后Audio Service处理核心业务逻辑。Redis Pub/Sub和PostgreSQL作为基础设施层，Lavalink是音频节点，YouTube API是外部音源。这样划分对吗？
对，就是这个结构。特别要注意的是，Gateway只负责接收和转发，真正的音频逻辑都在Audio Service里。还有，Redis在这里是消息队列的作用，不是简单的缓存。
好的，我先画出顶层参与者。User在最左边，然后依次是Discord API、Gateway Service、Redis Pub/Sub、Audio Service、PostgreSQL、Lavalink，最右边是YouTube API。我在顶部加了一个注释说明整体流程目的。
现在画命令发起阶段。用户输入/play "never gonna give you up"，Discord把INTERACTION_CREATE事件推给Gateway。Gateway要先校验权限，然后立即回一个处理中的消息给用户，不能让用户干等着。
画好了。User到Discord是斜杠命令，Discord到Gateway是INTERACTION_CREATE事件，我标注了activate。然后Gateway有个自注释说明校验逻辑，接着Gateway回调Discord显示处理中消息，Discord向User展示。
接下来Gateway要查数据库获取服务器设置，然后通过Redis把命令发给Audio Service。这里有个关键点：Redis是异步的，Gateway发完就不管了，不需要等Audio Service响应。
已添加。Gateway查询PostgreSQL的guild_settings表，拿到配置后向Redis Pub/Sub发布消息，频道是discord-bot:commands。Redis有个注释说明消息已入队，然后消息投递给Audio Service。
Audio Service收到消息后，要先查当前队列状态。然后根据查询是URL还是搜索词走不同分支。如果是搜索词，要走Lavalink去搜YouTube。这里用alt分支来表示。
画好了alt分支。第一个分支是URL直接解析，第二个分支是搜索词：Audio Service调用Lavalink的/loadtracks接口，Lavalink向YouTube API发起搜索，返回结果给Lavalink，再回给Audio Service。Audio Service选第一个结果。
搜索结果要缓存一下，用Redis的SETEX，5分钟过期。然后进入队列逻辑：如果队列是空的，这是第一首歌，要启动播放；如果队列有歌，就追加到末尾。这是核心的alt分支。
已添加缓存和队列分支。Audio Service用SETEX缓存搜索结果，然后alt分支：空队列时插入数据库，然后调用Lavalink创建player并连接语音频道，Lavalink从YouTube拉流，编码后通过Discord发送opus包给用户。
这里Lavalink和Discord的语音连接要画清楚。Lavalink主动向Discord建连，建好后才开始从YouTube拉音频流。还有，player创建和语音连接是分开的两个步骤。
明白，我调整一下。Lavalink先向Discord建立语音连接，连接成功后Lavalink从YouTube下载并编码音频，然后发送opus包给Discord，Discord最终向用户播放。我在中间加了编码的注释。
队列非空的情况也要画：查当前最大position，然后插入新记录。之后更新队列缓存，最后发送UI更新。这里还有个分支：如果是第一首歌要发"正在播放"的卡片，如果是追加就发"已加入队列"的 ephemeral 消息。
画好了。非空队列分支：查max position，插入记录，更新Redis缓存。然后alt UI更新：第一首歌时Audio发消息到Redis，Gateway收到后向Discord发消息并删除原始处理消息；追加时Gateway直接修改原始消息为 ephemeral 的确认。
还要画播放中的事件循环。Lavalink每5秒发PlayerUpdate给Audio Service，Audio通过Redis广播，Gateway可以按需更新UI。这个用loop来表示。
已添加loop。Lavalink每5秒向Audio Service发送PlayerUpdate，Audio发布到discord-bot:to-discord频道，Gateway消费后决定是否需要更新UI。循环持续到歌曲结束。
最后是歌曲结束的处理。Lavalink发TrackEnd事件，Audio Service要：1）删除当前队列记录；2）重新索引position；3）然后三个分支：有下一首就播放；没歌但开了autoplay就推荐相似歌曲；没歌且没开autoplay就销毁player并更新UI。
画好了结尾部分。TrackEnd事件触发后，Audio Service删除position=0的记录，然后UPDATE所有记录减1。接着alt三个分支：有下一首则查询并播放；autoplay启用则自调用获取相似歌曲；否则删除Lavalink player，广播队列空事件，Gateway更新Discord消息显示队列结束。
检查一下，autoplay分支里"Audio-Audio"的自调用要表达清楚，这是内部推荐逻辑，不是外部服务调用。还有最后要有个注释表示整个流程结束。
调整了，Audio Service的自调用加了注释说明是基于最后播放歌曲获取相似推荐。最后加了Note over User,YouTube表示Flow complete。我还检查了一下所有activate和deactivate的配对，确保没有遗漏。
整体结构没问题了。不过Gateway Service在几个地方的回调路径要再确认一下：删除原始消息的操作是在第一首歌播放后才执行，这个顺序对吗？
对的，我检查了：第一首歌播放时，Gateway先发新消息显示"正在播放"，然后DELETE删除最初的"处理中"消息；追加队列时则是直接PATCH原始消息为"已加入队列"。两种路径的处理逻辑不同，图里已经区分清楚了。
最后加一些关键的数据库字段标注，比如guildId、position这些，让读图的人明白查询条件。还有Lavalink的sessionId和guildId参数也要体现。
已补充。数据库查询都标注了WHERE guildId = ?，position相关的操作也标了MAX(position)和position = position - 1。Lavalink的接口路径里标了{sessionId}和{guildId}占位符。这样整个流程的数据依赖就清晰了。
很好，这个时序图完整覆盖了/play命令的全生命周期。从用户发起、权限校验、异步处理、音源搜索、队列管理、播放控制到结束清理，所有关键环节都有了。可以定稿了。
